assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Vercel account, import a Git repository, and open the first hosted deployment.

first_success.outcome: Vercel builds the imported repository and serves a production deployment URL.
first_success.observable_signal: The deployment shows Ready and its generated URL loads the application.

route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.

candidates.name: Dashboard Git deployment
candidates.reason: The dashboard imports and deploys a Git repository without requiring the Vercel CLI or a local deployment command.

candidates.name: Vercel CLI deployment
candidates.reason: It requires local CLI installation and authentication; the dashboard Git path is fully hosted.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Vercel.
Authorize the Git provider and choose Add New Project.
Import the repository and review the detected framework and project settings.
required_path.observable_result: The project is ready to deploy.
Vercel starts the build and deployment.

required_path.action: Wait for the deployment to reach Ready.
required_path.observable_result: A production deployment URL is available.

prerequisites.description: A supported Git provider account with a deployable repository.
Permission for Vercel to access the selected repository.

external_gates.description: The Git provider must authorize Vercel to read the repository.

unavoidable_waits.description: The build and deployment must complete before the URL is ready.

platform_outcomes.description: Vercel builds the imported repository and serves a production deployment URL.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Git-provider authorization screens and build configuration vary by repository and framework.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
